html:
Exclusive to:

“Break pocket watches down into their original ingredients other than Nightmare Fuel.”

-

The Clockmaker's Tools are a Character-specific Item craftable only by Wanda in the Tools Filter and Survivor Items Filter. They require 1 Gold Nugget, 1 Flint and 3 Twigs to craft.

They can be used to take pocket watches that are not on cooldown apart, returning 100% of their crafting materials. However in the case of the Alarming Clock, no Nightmare Fuel will be returned. Clockmaker's Tools can also be used to craft Time Pieces, which are the essential ingredients of all pocket watches.

Gallery

  • Concept art of the Clockmaker's Tools from Rhymes With Play #282.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam

recipes.note: Clockmaker's Tools will not be consumed.

“I wonder if she got them second hand.”
–Wilson
“A bunch of little tools.”
–Willow
“These tools too tiny for Wolfgang's mighty hands!”
–Wolfgang
“Tools for watch surgery.”
–Wendy
“YOU KEEP THOSE AWAY FROM ME, FLESHSACK”
–WX-78
“These tools are specialized for clockmaking.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'll stick to my axe, thanks.”
–Woodie
“Little hand tools, how quaint.”
–Maxwell
“The töols öf a craftswöman.”
–Wigfrid
“Can we play with your tools, Ms. Wanda? We'll be careful!”
–Webber
“Oh, Mme. Wanda left her tools!”
–Warly
“Full of funny little sticks”
–Wormwood
“Wish I'd had the chance to grab some of my tools before I got here.”
–Winona
“The tools of a time tinkerer.”
–Wortox
“Won't break them, florp! Promise!”
–Wurt
“Making clocks looks pretty complicated.”
–Walter
“Everything I need for building and dismantling my lovely clocks.”
–Wanda
“Break pocket watches down into their original ingredients other than Nightmare Fuel.”
-
The Clockmaker's Tools are a Character-specific Item craftable only by Wanda in the Tools Filter and Survivor Items Filter. They require 1 Gold Nugget, 1 Flint and 3 Twigs to craft.
They can be used to take pocket watches that are not on cooldown apart, returning 100% of their crafting materials. However in the case of the Alarming Clock, no Nightmare Fuel will be returned. Clockmaker's Tools can also be used to craft Time Pieces, which are the essential ingredients of all pocket watches.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Công cụ của Thợ đồng hồ là một Vật phẩm dành riêng cho Nhân vật chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Wanda trong Bộ lọc Công cụ và Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Sống sót. Chúng cần 1 Thỏi Vàng, 1 Đá Lửa và 3 Cành Cây để chế tạo.
title: Clockmaker's Tools

The '''Clockmaker's Tools''' are a Character-specific Item craftable only by [[Wanda]] in the [[Tools Filter]] and [[Survivor Items Filter]]. They require 1 [[Gold Nugget]], 1 [[Flint]] and 3 [[Twigs]] to craft.

They can be used to take pocket watches that are not on cooldown apart, returning 100% of their crafting materials. However in the case of the [[Alarming Clock]], no [[Nightmare Fuel]] will be returned. <!-- When the Clockmaker's Tools are in the player's inventory, they can serve as the crafting station used to craft [[Time Pieces]] nope, it's NOT a craft station. -->{{PAGENAME}} can also be used to craft [[Time Pieces]], which are the essential ingredients of all pocket watches.<!-- currently only verified for ageless watch -->

{{clear}}
== {{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Clockmaker's Tools
|item2 = Thulecite Fragments
|count2 = 8
|item3 = Nightmare Fuel
|count3 = 2
|result = Time Pieces
|character = wanda
|note = Clockmaker's Tools will not be consumed.
}}
